title: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpea curry with deep-fried fluffy bread. A Punjabi favourite and street food staple.

steps.summary: Prepare chickpeas and cook until soft.
subSteps: Pressure cook for 4-5 whistles until completely soft.
Drain excess water, reserve 1 cup chickpea water.
steps.tip: Cooked chickpeas can be made a day ahead and stored in refrigerator.

subSteps: Heat oil in a large pan, add cumin seeds.
Add finely chopped onions and cook until golden brown.
Add ginger, garlic, and green chillies, cook 2 minutes.
Add crushed tomatoes and cook until oil separates.
Add all spices: turmeric, red chilli powder, garam masala.
Cook spices for 1 minute in oil.
Add cooked chickpeas and reserved water.
Simmer for 10-12 minutes until flavors blend.
Adjust salt and spice according to taste.
steps.tip: The curry should be medium consistency — not too thick, not too watery.

seo.metaTitle: Chole Bhature Recipe — Authentic Punjabi Style
seo.metaDescription: Master this classic Punjabi recipe with step-by-step instructions for spiced chickpea curry.
